message:
feat(tui): add Graph mode detail pane scrolling (Ctrl+j/k/d/u)

Graph mode detail pane was not scrollable — the dense metrics report
could be cut off at the bottom with no way to read it. Add scroll
support matching Main/Board modes:
- Ctrl+j/k: scroll by 3 lines
- Ctrl+d/u: scroll by 10 lines (page)
- Reset on selection change

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
